concerns.text: Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires random seeds pinned in code/ but no task explicitly mandates seed pinning in Python scripts. T002 creates requirements.txt, T024 sets seeds in run_pipeline.sh, but code-level seed pinning is not explicitly tasked.

Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires datasets checksummed with checksums recorded in state/. T028 mentions data hashes in manifest.json but no task explicitly creates checksums for data files under data/.

Constitution Principle VII (Feature Engineering Reproducibility) requires each feature script to record input data sources, transformation steps, and output files. T017-T020 implement feature scripts but no task explicitly mandates documenting transformation steps in each script.

Phase 6 (Reviewer Concerns) tasks T045-T053 address content features not in spec.md. This is scope expansion without spec amendment. Tagging these as [US2] is misleading since they don't map to existing spec user stories.
T031 implements LOUOCV but spec FR-005 requires k-fold CV. Task should either tag [FR-005 fix] or spec should be amended. Current tagging [US2] obscures the spec deviation.
